class.name: PlayFabMatchmakingTicketConfig
class.brief_description: Configuration for creating a matchmaking ticket.
class.description: Passed to [method PlayFabMultiplayer.create_match_ticket_async]. Immediate validation failures use [code]invalid_match_ticket_config[/code] when the config is missing, [member queue_name] is blank, or [member timeout_seconds] is less than or equal to zero. If [member members] is empty, the requesting [PlayFabUser] is used as the single member.

members.member: PlayFab matchmaking queue name. This must be non-empty and must match a queue configured for the title.
Ticket timeout in seconds. Must be greater than zero.
